title: HostRuntimeLifecycleState
description: Describes the current lifecycle phase of the SourceOS host runtime, from sealed boot through a live user session.

id.description: URN uniquely identifying this lifecycle state snapshot.

state.description: Current lifecycle phase of the host runtime.

previousState.description: The state immediately preceding the current one.

deviceRef.description: URN of the device this lifecycle record is scoped to.

identityRef.description: URN of the confirmed sovereign identity, populated from IDENTITY_CONFIRMED onward.

orgPolicyRef.description: URN of the loaded org policy manifest, populated from ORG_POLICY_READY onward.

capabilityGraphRef.description: URN of the capability graph snapshot, populated from CAPABILITY_GRAPH_READY onward.

sessionRef.description: URN of the active user session, populated from SESSION_READY onward.

observedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this state was observed.

transitionedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the transition into this state completed.

faultRef.description: URN of a FaultEnvelope record if the transition involved a fault or recovery.

drainReason.description: Human-readable reason for entering DRAINING (user logout, policy revocation, etc.). Required when state is DRAINING.
